title: Changelog Entry
description: Data that renders one per-skill changelog file under <skill>/changelog/. The rendered file has NO frontmatter: it starts with the summary paragraph, then a spec-folder pointer line, then #### category subsections.

version.description: Target version for this release, e.g. 1.11.0.0.

summary.description: Lead paragraph: what this release does and why it matters. Rendered first, no header above it.

spec_folder_pointer.description: Spec folder path for the > Spec folder: pointer line. This is the ONLY place a spec/phase citation is allowed.

name.description: Rendered as a #### Category Name subsection (H4, never H3).

what.description: What was broken or missing, and what changed.
